hindi: जय बालाजी महावीर। मेहंदीपुर में विराजत बीर॥
english: Victory to Balaji Mahavira; the hero dwelling in Mehandipur
roman: Jai Balaji Mahaveer, Mehndeepur Mein Virajat Veer

hindi: हनुमान के बालाजी रूप। मेहंदीपुर का दिव्य स्वरूप॥
english: The Balaji form of Hanuman; the divine form of Mehandipur
roman: Hanuman Ke Balaji Roop, Mehndeepur Ka Divya Swaroop

hindi: भूत प्रेत और ऊपरी बाधा। बालाजी करते हैं सब साधा॥
english: Ghosts, spirits and all supernatural disturbances; Balaji resolves them all
roman: Bhoot Pret Aur Oopari Baadha, Balaji Karte Hain Sab Sadha

hindi: लाखों भक्त दर्शन को आते। सब संकट दूर होते जाते॥
english: Lakhs of devotees come for darshan; all troubles go far away
roman: Laakhon Bhakt Darshan Ko Aate, Sab Sankat Door Hote Jaate

hindi: प्रेतराज सरकार के दरबार। बालाजी का अद्भुत संसार॥
english: The court of King Preta Sarkar; the wondrous world of Balaji
roman: Pretraj Sarkar Ke Darbar, Balaji Ka Adbhut Sansar

hindi: बालाजी चालीसा जो पढ़े। भूत-प्रेत का भय सब मिटे॥
english: Whoever reads the Balaji Chalisa; all fear of ghosts and spirits is removed
roman: Balaji Chalisa Jo Padhe, Bhoot Pret Ka Bhay Sab Mite

hindi: जय जय बालाजी महाराज। शरण आए का करो सब काज॥
english: Victory to Balaji Maharaj; accomplish all tasks of those who seek shelter
roman: Jai Jai Balaji Maharaj, Sharan Aaye Ka Karo Sab Kaaj
